message:
Update ufunc oracle reference outputs for new unary operations

Regenerate oracle output fixtures with NumPy reference values for the
8 newly added unary operations (cbrt, expm1, log1p, degrees, radians,
rint, trunc, spacing) to complete conformance coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
